items.name: 三五詠歌碑
items.description: 天保4年（1833年）建立。高さ1m72cm、幅1m。根府川石。水害を記録した碑文と15首の和歌。本居太平撰文。

en.description_en: A poem monument (Sango eika-hi), classified as calligraphy under tangible cultural properties. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture. Located in the garden of the Morijiri residence, Minami-oshima.

items.name: 阿弥陀三尊板碑
items.description: 高さ65cm、幅24cm。永仁3年（1295年）7月20日造立。田島地区「正和の板碑」と並び町の文化財に指定。

en.description_en: A stone tablet (itabi) depicting the Amida triad, classified as a stone object under tangible cultural properties. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture. Located on the Akino residence grounds, Yajima.

items.name: 正和の板碑
items.description: 高さ89cm、幅29cm。正和4年（1315年）3月6日造立。阿弥陀仏を表す梵字刻。町の文化財に指定。

en.description_en: A stone tablet (itabi) of the Showa (medieval Shōwa era) period, classified as a stone object under tangible cultural properties. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture. Located on the Aoki residence grounds, Tajima.

items.name: 経塚附石経圓塔
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 正徳3年（1713年）5月27日、行鑁上人が大般若経六百巻・光明真言百万遍を書写して埋め、石経圓塔を建てた。この石経圓塔は町の指定史跡。

en.name_en: Sutra Mound with Stone Sutra Pagoda
en.description_en: A sutra mound (kyozuka) with an attached stone sutra pagoda, designated as a historic site. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture. Located within the precinct of Niisato Tenmangu shrine.

items.name: 菅原神社鳥居
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 元文元年（1736年）、慶讃上人が四国188ヶ所巡礼地域の繁栄を願い奉納した鳥居。「天満宮 一天泰平四海静謐…元文元丙辰裁九月吉日」の銘文。町指定史跡。

en.description_en: The torii gate of Sugawara Shrine, designated as a historic site. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture. Located at Sugawara Shrine, Suka.

items.name: 江黒古墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 直径10m程の円墳。墳丘の保存状態もよく、明和村から町になって以降も明和町の指定文化財。

en.description_en: The Eguro ancient burial mound (kofun), designated as a historic site. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture. Located in Eguro.

items.name: 川俣事件衝突の地
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 川俣・川俣上宿橋付近
items.description: 明治33年（1900年）2月13日、足尾銅山鉱毒被害農民約3000人が東京への押し出し中、警察と衝突した川俣事件の現場。日本初の公害問題の史跡。

en.name_en: Site of the Kawamata Incident Clash
en.description_en: The site where the clash of the Kawamata Incident took place, designated as a historic site. Town-designated by Meiwa, Gunma Prefecture, on 1999-12-28. Located near the Kawamata Kamijuku bridge, Kawamata.
